description.ko: 비에 젖은 사이버펑크 거대 도시 속의 도시적 고독을 활기차게 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A vibrant exploration of urban solitude within a rain-drenched cyberpunk megacity.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Chromatic Pulse.' Towering #1A0033 indigo megastructures reflect off rain-slicked metallic asphalt in a high-tech intersection. A torrential holographic downpour creates #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan data pixels upon impact with wet surfaces. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long, vibrant #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering lens flares, and ray-traced puddle reflections. 8k resolution, the urban romanticism of a neon-soaked future.
